name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.PointGunHelper.MassMultDetachedSupport
summary: Amount of mass of weapon taken into account by gravity opposition on pointing arm when a support arm is detached from a two-handed weapon.  The lower the value the more the character doesn't know about the weapon mass and therefore is more affected by it.
remarks:
Default value = 0.1f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
